case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS BOLT, BARNEY P., III

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-23-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-14-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCES, SETTLEMENT WILL BE CONSIDERED COMPLETED AND CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,350.56 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT BOLT, BARNEY P., III ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLT, BARNEY P., III HEARING SET FOR APR-16-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLT, BARNEY P., III $2,350.56 PRINCIPAL, $115.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,466.43 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOLT, BARNEY P., III NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOLT, BARNEY P., III
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-16-2004, GRANTED
